rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component type or implementation scopes while preserving AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
Use implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` to define equations and `guarantee` to specify guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: Defensive rules for assumed type vs actual type and opaque Boolean data range comparison
